---
title: "长尾分布"
description: "少数头部项出现频繁，大量尾部项各自出现很少的分布形态"
---

```{python}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Pareto 分布，alpha 越小尾部越长
data = (np.random.pareto(a=1.5, size=1000) + 1) * 10

plt.hist(data, bins=50, log=True)
plt.title("Long-tail distribution (Pareto)")
plt.show()
```
